template:
test -f benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/aligned/adna_contamination_panel_screen.sam.bai && verifybamid2 --BamFile benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/aligned/adna_contamination_panel_screen.sam --Reference benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/reference/adna_bam_reference.fasta --SVDPrefix benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/reference/adna_contamination_panel.dat --Output benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.contamination/contamination && if [ -f benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.contamination/contamination.selfSM ]; then cp benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.contamination/contamination.selfSM benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.contamination/contamination.json; else : > benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.contamination/contamination.json; fi && python - <<'PY' > benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.contamination/contamination.summary.json
import json
print(json.dumps(json.loads("{
  "assumptions": "governed aDNA BAM corpus contamination panel with shared non-UDG reference for local contamination planning",
  "emit_confidence_caveats": true,
  "method": "verifybamid2",
  "minimum_mean_coverage": 0.5,
  "reference": "benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/reference/adna_bam_reference.fasta",
  "reference_panels": [
    "benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-adna-bam-mini/reference/adna_contamination_panel.dat"
  ],
  "scope": "nuclear",
  "tool_scope": "nuclear"
}"), indent=2))
PY

params.assumptions: governed aDNA BAM corpus contamination panel with shared non-UDG reference for local contamination planning

effective_params.assumptions: governed aDNA BAM corpus contamination panel with shared non-UDG reference for local contamination planning
